arts.ttl: Man United given Joshua Zirkzee transfer answer as Juventus chief addresses rumours
arts.sum: Juventus director Cristian Giuntoli responds to rumours that his side could target Manchester United striker Joshua Zirkzee during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba to Man City verdict as Pep Guardiola's side 'sound out' ex-Man United midfielder
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly weigh up a shock move for free agent Paul Pogba, but the midfielder holds reservations due to his time at Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim green lights first transfer since becoming Man Utd boss
arts.sum: Manchester United desperately need some signings to get themselves back on track in the Premier League this season and new boss Ruben Amorim has now settled on his first signing

arts.ttl: Here's why Jadon Sancho is back to his best at Chelsea - he is a loss for Man United and is making his case for an England return, writes DANNY MURPHY
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: Sancho is again looking like the winger who ripped it up for Borussia Dortmund and it already feels like a no-brainer to turn his loan move into a permanent agreement.

arts.ttl: Rodri 'could return for Manchester City THIS season' - as injured Ballon d'Or winner 'starts running again' after knee surgery
arts.sum: Rodri could target a return with Manchester City before the end of the Premier League season with the injured star beginning to run during his rehabilitation, according to reports.

arts.ttl: 'It's done' - Pep Guardiola is clear on Man City exit after bad results
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about his future as he faces up to his worst ever run of results

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola responds to claims he has lost the Manchester City dressing room
arts.sum: Manchester City have lost seven of their last 10 games and Pep Guardiola has been accused of losing the dressing room with a number of his key players struggling for form or being left out of the side

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne issues warning to Man City team-mates as horror run continues
arts.sum: Manchester City have endured an awful run of form as they head into Sunday's derby with Manchester United and Kevin de Bruyne has now spoken out on the crisis engulfing the champions

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola on new Man City contract and when it'll be time to leave: 'No regrets'
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has explained his thinking behind committing his future to Manchester City until 2027 as the Blues' nosedive continues

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola has new appreciation for Man City feats after recent poor form
arts.sum: City take on Manchester United at the Etihad on Sunday having won only one of their last 10 games.
